qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I'm unsure about the required frequency for running a specific type of job?
qa_pairs.answer: If you don't know the answer to how frequently you'll need to run a job, our technical support team is available to help you find the answers. They can then direct you to the most appropriate resources for your needs.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of training opportunities are available through the Alliance?
qa_pairs.answer: Most workshops are organized by the Alliance's regional partners, offering both online and in-person training opportunities on a wide variety of subjects and at different levels of sophistication.

qa_pairs.question: Who is responsible for organizing the training workshops?
qa_pairs.answer: Most workshops are organized by the Alliance's regional partners.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find training materials and information for WestDRI?
qa_pairs.answer: For WestDRI, you can consult their Training Materials website (https://training.westdri.ca) to find upcoming sessions or recorded webinars, and the UAlberta ARC Bootcamp site (https://www.ualberta.ca/information-services-and-technology/research-computing/bootcamps.html) for videos of previous sessions.

qa_pairs.question: What training resources does SHARCNET provide?
qa_pairs.answer: SHARCNET offers a Training Events Calendar (https://www.sharcnet.ca/my/news/calendar), a YouTube Channel (http://youtube.sharcnet.ca/), and Online Workshops (https://training.sharcnet.ca/).

qa_pairs.question: How can I access training information for SciNet?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find training information for SciNet on their Education Site (https://education.scinet.utoronto.ca) and their YouTube Channel (https://www.youtube.com/c/SciNetHPCattheUniversityofToronto).

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find workshops and training details for Calcul Québec?
qa_pairs.answer: Calcul Québec provides workshops (https://calculquebec.eventbrite.ca/) and general training information (https://www.calculquebec.ca/en/academic-research-services/training/).

qa_pairs.question: What training resources are offered by ACENET?
qa_pairs.answer: ACENET offers training information (https://www.ace-net.ca/training.html) and has a YouTube Channel (https://www.youtube.com/@ACENETDRI).

qa_pairs.question: Is there a central list of all upcoming training events?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you can see a complete and merged list of upcoming training events on Explora (https://explora.alliancecan.ca/events).
